texto: On rainy days or summer evenings or during long programs designed for adults, we were not allowed to say, "This is boring" or "I'm bored." If she even thought she smelled those words coming, she would quietly remind me that my attitude was what I made of it. If I was bored it was because I was boring.
explicacao: Citação de Beth Guckenberger sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “On rainy days or summer evenings or during long programs designed for adults, we were not allowed…” articula reflexao, inspirational-attitude, boring em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como dia-chuvoso e inspiracao.
